product.name: 32 Single Bathroom Vanity, with Engineered Marble Top & Backsplash Soft-Close, Black
product.description: This transitional vanity is a beautiful piece of bathroom furniture will look amazing in your design scheme. The cabinet features a shaker style smooth door panel with simple round knobs and soft close hinges provide ample room for accessories. Packed with multiple side drawers with soft close glides for added comfort and full access to bath supplies. Convenient deep drawer stores all of your tall bath essentials. Constructed of engineered wood and solid wood legs with hand painted finish. The durable engineered marble countertop is a versatile material in an ivory white finish. Minor assembly of the legs needed to get this vanity up and running. Comes with a matching backsplash to complete the look and protects your wall.
features: [Premium Materials]: Crafted with durable engineered marble top in ivory white finish and hand-painted vanity base for long-lasting elegance.
[Effortless Functionality]: Designed with soft closing glides and hinges for a smooth and quiet operation.
[Ample Storage]: Features two drawers, one cabinet, and a convenient shelf to neatly store all your bathroom essentials.
[Practical Design]: Countertop with 3 predrilled faucet holes (faucet not included) and a rectangle porcelain sink with discreet overflow hole.
[Complete Set]: Includes a matching 32"L x 0.75"W x 4"H backsplash for a cohesive and stylish look.
